title: Moderation Update - April 19, 2026
body:
## Community Moderation Summary

### Actions Taken
- **Banned 2 users** for severe violations:
  - spam_wave_42: Phishing spam across 6 channels
  - toxic_runner: Repeated targeted harassment against newcomers

### Reports Closed
- 3 high-severity reports processed and closed
- 1 false positive (core_maintainer) — mass report by brigading users dismissed

### Remaining
- 3 lower-severity reports pending review (medium/low priority)

Our community safety team continues monitoring. Report violations via the usual channels.
